display_text: Vindicator's Axe, Tier 3: Neutral item providing +35 Attack Speed and +30 Damage. Its Vengeance passive grants an additional +30 Damage if the equipped hero is Silenced and +20 Armor if the equipped hero is Stunned, making it powerful for heroes under hard control. Also provides +20% Slow Resistance. Stats: Attack Speed: +35, Damage: +30, Armor: +20, Slow Resist: +20%.
